title: Update dependency openapi-schema-validator to ~=0.9.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [openapi-schema-validator](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator) | `~=0.8.1` → `~=0.9.0` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/pypi/openapi-schema-validator/0.9.0?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/pypi/openapi-schema-validator/0.8.1/0.9.0?slim=true) |

---

> [!WARNING]
> Some dependencies could not be looked up. Check the [Dependency Dashboard](../issues/18109) for more information.

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator (openapi-schema-validator)</summary>

### [`v0.9.0`](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/releases/tag/0.9.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/compare/0.8.1...0.9.0)

#### Features

- Enforce properties required flag [#​290](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/290)

#### Fixes

- OAS 3.1/3.2 discriminator is annotation-only [#​279](https://redirect.github.com/python-openapi/openapi-schema-validator/issues/279)

#### Backward incompatibilities

- `OAS31Validator` and `OAS32Validator` no longer use discriminator-driven schema selection for `oneOf`, `anyOf`, or `allOf`.
- For OpenAPI 3.1 and 3.2, `discriminator` is now treated as a hint/annotation and does not change validation outcome.
- Validation results may change for schemas that previously relied on discriminator-based narrowing or on discriminator mapping resolution errors during validation.

</details>

---
